ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the student's record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Whether the student passed */,
  "measurement" REAL /* Measurement of the student's performance */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the student lives */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the student lives */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the student's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the student lives */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date when the student graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, Masters, PhD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Number of years required to complete the education level */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA required to graduate at this level */,
  "pre_requisite_education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pre-requisite education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_pre_requisite_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("pre_requisite_education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the demographic record belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the student */,
  "dependent_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the student has */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_numeric" (
  "education_numeric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education numeric record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the education numeric record belongs to */,
  "education_numeric" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the education level */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned by the student */,
  "credits_required" INTEGER /* Number of credits required to graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_numeric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_numeric_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "masters" (
  "master_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Master's record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the Master's record belongs to */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the Master's degree */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the Master's degree */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the Master's thesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("master_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_masters_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phd" (
  "phd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PhD record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the PhD record belongs to */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the PhD degree */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the PhD degree */,
  "dissertation_title" TEXT /* Title of the PhD dissertation */,
  "advisors" TEXT /* Names of the PhD advisors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phd_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "female" (
  "female_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each female record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the female record belongs to */,
  "is_married" INTEGER /* Whether the female student is married */,
  "children_count" INTEGER /* Number of children the female student has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("female_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_female_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the performance record belongs to */,
  "measurement" REAL /* Measurement of the student's performance */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Whether the student passed */,
  "test_scores" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of test scores */,
  "course_grades" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of course grades */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consultants" (
  "consultant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consultant */,
  "consultant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the consultant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the consultant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the consultant (e.g., consultant, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the consultant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the consultant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the consultant lives */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the consultant lives */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the consultant's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the consultant lives */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consultant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "consultant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consultant accessing the analytics */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being analyzed */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were accessed */,
  "consultant_notes" TEXT /* Notes made by the consultant during the analytics session */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_consultant_id FOREIGN KEY ("consultant_id") REFERENCES consultants ("consultant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "consultant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consultant making the prediction */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome for the student */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "reasoning" TEXT /* Reasoning behind the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_consultant_id FOREIGN KEY ("consultant_id") REFERENCES consultants ("consultant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education outcome */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the student (e.g., graduated, dropped out) */,
  "outcome_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the outcome */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps for the student after the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_outcomes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consultant_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "consultant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consultant the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the consultant (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consultant_permissions_consultant_id FOREIGN KEY ("consultant_id") REFERENCES consultants ("consultant_id")
)
